reuse_candidates.reason: Canonical Point B lock already exists.
Useful repair path exists but escalation law is too weak.
Bounded executor exists but needs new policy and carry-forward rules.
Proposal synthesis exists but needs enforceable blueprint-delta output.
Real UI proof surface exists but truth thresholds are too weak.

parts_car_candidates.reason: Legacy queue runner should not remain near active authority without hard quarantine.

replacement_candidates.reason: Completion semantics must live in one shared helper.

retirement_candidates.path: false-green use of TECHNICAL_PASS as queue complete

wisdom_lessons: Useful runtime pieces should be salvaged instead of rewritten from scratch.
History must remain history or cold agents drift.
UI proof catches what backend proof misses.
cfo_recommendation: Prefer reuse and extension over rewrite where the existing part is structurally sound.
arc_decision: Reuse the canonical queue and proof surfaces; replace duplicate completion logic and weak repair policy with shared enforced modules.
